fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 72 incorrectly identifies a scenario for removing a duplicate element. When both input streams end with the same value, the code on line 73 wrongly removes one instance of that value from the result.

spec.expr: not (out__1 and left and right and out__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: A shared tail value between inputs should not trigger the element removal logic.
Popping an element must not violate the total element count invariant.
If no element is popped, the total element count must be preserved.
The final merged stream must contain all elements from both input streams.
